MOTION FOR LEAVE TO Amend The Summons And Complaint And File First Amended Summons And First Amended Complaint To Include A Survival Action On Behalf Of The Decedent Sean La Febre; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof; Declarations Of Angela Mia Veronese And Dina Marie La Febre [Proposed] First Amended Summons And Furst Amended Complaint; And [Proposed] Order Thereon
Off Calendar May-01-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Prior to the hearing Dina La Febre appeared via Zoom. The clerk informs the party to coordinate with their counsel re ruling of the court.

No appearances n Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF SEAN LA FEBRE's MOTION FOR LEAVE TO Amend The Summons And Complaint And File First Amended Summons And First Amended Complaint To Include A Survival Action On Behalf Of The Decedent Sean La Febren.

Plaintiff's Motion for Leave to Amend the Complaint to Include Successors in Interest is GRANTED.

(see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
